rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF MARLA RODRIGUEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO TERMINATE CONSERVATORSHIP of Estate
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/25/2025. Issues necessitating a continuance: 1) No notice of hearing has been filed with the court (Probate Code Section 1460). 2) The ending balance of cash assets in accounts must be verified. Verification is made by original bank or brokerage statements or original bank letters signed by a bank officer with the authority to sign, showing the vesting of the account, the date, and the amount of the balance. The statements or letters must encompass, not precede, the ending date of the accounting period (San Francisco Local Rule 14.34.D). 3) No proposed order has been received or lodged with the court (San Francisco Local Rule 14.7.A) Please address the above issues and provide courtesy copies of all further filings to this examiner no later than 11/12/2025 to avoid additional continuance.

[LRSF 14.35 I.6.b.] Please make a note of it.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ROKSVAG-ZANGER BYPASS TRUST ESTABLISHED BY THE ROKSVAG-ZANGER FAMILY TRUST DTD 6/26/2014 RUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Ex Parte Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust Terms And Appointing A Trustee Upon The Consent Of All Beneficiaries Under Probate Code Section 15403 (Prob C 17200(B)(10) And (13)
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issues to be cleared/addressed: (1) Petition and Proposed Order need to clearly state in which paragraph the proposed additional provisions (pages 6 to 8) to be added to Art. Seven of the trust. The petition does not mention the section numbers. (2) The petition must state that this modification does not undermine the material purpose of the original provision 6.8 (e) Withholding Distributions. This includes, but is not limited to, the second sentence, which states, "......the settlors would not want the assets distributed outright to that beneficiary." PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KEFANG ZHANG
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, although items 3g(2)(b) and (c) of the petition were not completed, item 7 of the petition was completed when it was not applicable, and the petitioner's name is Edward Zhou, but the Judicial Council form DE-147S showed a different name without any "AKA", and the waiver of bond was incomplete (not dated). Status of closing the estate will be set for 4/27/27. The administrator must file either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report of status of administration pursuant to Prob. C. Section 12200 (requesting additional time for estate administration) at least two weeks before 4/27/27. Appearance will be required on that status date if no petition has been filed.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOSEPH E. JOHNSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/4/2025. The following issues must be cleared before 10/31/2025. (1) Petition #8 to set forth Laura Lee Smith's information, especially the date of death if she is deceased. (2) Petition #8 to identify the acting trustee and the beneficiary of the sole devisee trust. (3) Petition #8 to specify the age of the listed heirs. (4) Need clarification if the decedent was survived by an issue of a predeceased child. Petition #5.(7)-(8) not affirmed.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RICHARD GENE LIM
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The judicial officer is to review and determine whether the will on file should be accepted as the original will, and counsel may be asked to address the following: 1) It is unclear who wrote "copy" on top of the first page of the will. 2) The decedent's signature on the will on file looks very different from his signature on the devisee trust (which was acknowledged by a notary public), even though he signed the will and trust on the same date (11/11/2007). 3) It is unclear why the decedent wrote "/s/" on the will, but not on the trust. 4) Did the decedent sign more than one original of the same will? 5) Is the will on file actually a colored copy? PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DALE EUGENE HALL JR
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. Status hearing: 4/27/2027. Personal Representative shall file either a petition for an order for final distribution or a petition for approval of report of status of administration pursuant to Prob. Code sec.12200 et seq. two weeks before this date.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RACHEL LEAH RASSEN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing solely to admit will. No appearance required. Status hearing: 4/27/2027. The personal representative shall file either a petition for an order for final distribution of the estate or a report of the status of administration in compliance with Prob. Code sec. 12200 et seq. two weeks before the hearing date.
